note: Seeded loaded for the vision-LLM demos (document-pipeline-v1, classify-and-group-v1, di-extraction-canary) now bound to the internal pool. NOT pulled by the default `just dev` (~7.8 GB) — `ollama pull llama3.2-vision:11b` and load it resident on the runner to flip the live-runner AND-gate available=true; until then GET /api/v1/models reports approved-but-not-available and those demos no-op the inference. Served through internal_pool_router → the in-cluster inference router.
